Mi pakhat a lungngai chuan engtin nge kan tanpui ang? Ngaihthlak sak a, thu thlamuan sawi hi a tangkai.
Online zirnaah eng thil nge mamawh ber? Internet tha, device fel, leh hun ruahmanna chiang a ngai.
Chawhmeh tui siam tur chuan eng nge pawimawh? Thil tel tha leh tui taka chhum dan hriat a pawimawh.
Exam hma chuan engtin nge inbuatsaih tur? Hun remchang siam a, zirtirna pawimawh te ennawn tur a ni.
Hna zawngtu chuan CV-ah eng nge dah tur? Zirna, thiamna, hna tawh, leh contact information dah tur a ni.
Thil lei hmain eng zawhna nge zawh tur? Man, quality, guarantee, leh return policy zawh a tha.
